spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor with final fields for repositories.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Introduce the new Spring Boot 3.2+ JdbcClient API alongside the existing JdbcTemplate approach.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Added import and field for StudentJdbcClientRepository and injected it via constructor.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Rename logger field to uppercase constant to follow standard Java naming conventions for static/final fields.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Renamed 'logger' to 'LOGGER' and updated all usages.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Add demonstration code for the new JdbcClient API to showcase its usage in the application runner.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.human_impl: Added LOGGER.info calls and repository method invocations for jdbcClientRepository.

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Add a method that returns a JSON string representation of the object using Java 15+ text blocks.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Removed unused SLF4J imports to clean up the codebase.
Removed the unused logger field instance.
Standardized indentation to use spaces instead of tabs.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.human_impl: Changed tab-indented fields and methods to space-indented (4 spaces)

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace requirements.
Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate getters, setters, constructors, and toString methods.
Delete explicit getter, setter, constructor, and toString implementations now handled by Lombok.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.human_impl: removed public Long getId() { return id; }

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Add @NonNull annotations from org.jspecify to repository type parameters to support null-safety features in newer Spring Data versions.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern Spring Boot testing standards.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.human_impl: Changed imports from org.junit.Test to org.junit.jupiter.api.Test and replaced @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class).

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Adjust code indentation to use spaces instead of tabs for consistent formatting.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.human_impl: Replaced tab characters with spaces in the method body indentation.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor accepting StudentRepository.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Rename logger instance to uppercase constant to follow Java naming conventions for static/final fields.
Move main method to the end of the class for better code organization.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: Moved public static void main method from top to bottom of class.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Add a log statement to print all users after performing CRUD operations.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace requirements.
Introduce Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for getters, setters, constructors, and toString.
Replace manual getter, setter, and toString implementations with the @Data annotation.
Replace manual constructor definitions with @NoArgsConstructor and @AllArgsConstructor annotations.
Remove explicit constructor bodies that are now generated by Lombok, keeping only the specific convenience constructor.
Add @NonNull annotations from org.jspecify to generic type parameters to support null-safety features in newer Java versions.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.human_impl: import org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull; ... extends JpaRepository<@NonNull Student, @NonNull Long>

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: Removed @Autowired from field and added constructor taking StudentMyBatisRepository.

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Update logger field to use final modifier and uppercase naming convention consistent with modern Java standards.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: Changed 'private Logger logger' to 'private final Logger LOGGER'.

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Remove throws Exception from CommandLineRunner.run method as it is no longer required in newer Spring Boot versions.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: Changed 'public void run(String... args) throws Exception' to 'public void run(String... args)'.

spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.general_idea: Replace the traditional POJO class with a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
spring-boot-2-myBatis-with-h2/src/main/j.human_impl: public record Student(Long id, String name, String passport) {}
